posts.text:
Posting postmortem about martyred naval officers


Ali Larijani | علی لاریجانی (@alilarijani_ir)

به مناسبت مراسم تشییع سلحشوران نیروی دریایی ارتش جمهوری اسلامی ایران: یاد آنان همواره در قلب ملت ایران خواهد بود و این شهادت‌ها بنیان ارتش جمهوری اسلامی را برای سالها در ساختار نیروهای مسلح استوار می‌نماید. ازخداوند متعال علو درجات برای این شهدای عزیز خواستارم.





— https://nitter.net/alilarijani_ir/status/2033840853370683829#m

عراقچی ضایع شد و حالا زده زیرش‌🙃


Alayna Treene (@alaynatreene)

The WH officials said Iranian Foreign Ministry Abbas Araghchi directly contacted Witkoff, but Witkoff opted not to respond.

Araghchi denies the he had had any contact with the president’s envoy in recent days.



— https://nitter.net/alaynatreene/status/2033690223909933544#m

Was told that the Islamic Republic is allowing one Western journalist at a time into Tehran (on a short-term journalist visa). First CNN, now it's Sky News...


Dominic Waghorn (@DominicWaghorn)

Day 2 in Iran.  Impressions:  
- the government remains fully in control, and defiant.  Ominous warning in interview with Sky about boots on the ground.
- the mood in Tehran is tense and subdued, many have fled the capital.  
- people though trying to get on as best they can 1/



— https://nitter.net/D
